steps.title: Set up the inequality from the constraint
steps.content: The total cost is $50h$ dollars for the rental plus $15$ dollars for the lesson, where $h$ is the number of hours. Since Jasmine wants to spend no more than $285$ dollars: $$50h + 15 \leq 285$$

steps.title: Solve the inequality
steps.content: Subtract 15 from both sides: $$50h \leq 270$$ Divide both sides by 50: $$h \leq \frac{270}{50} = \frac{27}{5} = 5.4$$

steps.title: Apply the whole number constraint
steps.content:
Since $h$ must be a whole number of hours and $h \leq 5.4$, the maximum value of $h$ is 5. Verify: $50(5) + 15 = 250 + 15 = 265 \leq 285$
The maximum number of hours is 5.
